tasks.subject: Task 0: Extend BotExtra with DmOutboundPolicy types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce the 4-mode policy type alongside BotExtra. Type-only, no runtime change.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/bots.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/server typecheck` → no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/bots.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["DmOutboundPolicyMode exported with 4 literal variants","DmOutboundPolicy exported with mode + optional userIds","BotExtra.dmOutboundPolicy?: DmOutboundPolicy field added","pnpm -C apps/server typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: assertBotCanDm ACL + default policy helpers with unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement policy enforcement helper inside ChannelsService with exhaustive unit tests for 4-mode matrix + boundary errors.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/server test -- channels.service.spec` → PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server test -- channels.service.spec","acceptanceCriteria":["assertBotCanDm(botUserId, targetUserId) throws correct exceptions (SELF_DM, CROSS_TENANT, DM_NOT_ALLOWED, USER_NOT_FOUND, BOT_NOT_FOUND)","defaultDmOutboundPolicy returns owner-only for personalStaff, same-tenant for commonStaff, owner-only otherwise","isTargetAllowed covers 4 modes exhaustively","12+ unit tests pass"]}
```


tasks.subject: Task 3: BotMessagingController + POST send-to-user endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose POST /v1/im/bot/send-to-user with full auth + ACL + create-or-reuse DM + delegated send.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/dto/send-to-user.dto.ts`
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.controller.ts`
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.module.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/im.module.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/server typecheck && pnpm -C apps/server build` → succeed.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/dto/send-to-user.dto.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.controller.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.module.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/im.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server typecheck && pnpm -C apps/server build","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /v1/im/bot/send-to-user returns {channelId, messageId} on happy path","guarded by AuthGuard (accepts bot tokens via BOT_TOKEN_VALIDATOR)","calls assertBotCanDm then createDirectChannel then sendFromBot","contains load-bearing TODO(rate-limit) comment","typecheck + build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GET /v1/im/bot/users/search endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bot-scoped user search for ResolveUser tool. Maps to bot-safe fields (no email), excludes bot users, tenant-hard-bound.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/dto/bot-user-search.dto.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.controller.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts` (add filterBotUserIds helper)

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/server typecheck && pnpm -C apps/server build` → succeed.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/dto/bot-user-search.dto.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bot/bot-messaging.controller.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server typecheck && pnpm -C apps/server build","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /v1/im/bot/users/search returns {results: [{userId, displayName, avatarUrl?}]}","no email field in response","excludes bot users via filterBotUserIds helper","tenantId hard-sourced from bot token, not query param","q requires 2+ chars, limit clamped 1-10 default 5"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Personal staff DTO + service — dmOutboundPolicy write + pino log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Accept dmOutboundPolicy on PATCH personal staff, validate whitelist ≤50, persist into BotExtra, emit pino log on real change.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/dto/personal-staff.dto.ts`
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/dto/dm-outbound-policy.dto.ts` (shared)
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/personal-staff.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/personal-staff.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/server test -- personal-staff.service.spec` → PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/dto/dm-outbound-policy.dto.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/dto/personal-staff.dto.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/personal-staff.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/personal-staff.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -C apps/server test -- personal-staff.service.spec","acceptanceCriteria":["DmOutboundPolicyDto validates mode against 4-mode enum","userIds validated as UUIDs with 1-50 cap (WHITELIST_TOO_LARGE on overflow)","UpdatePersonalStaffDto.dmOutboundPolicy? added","updateStaff merges policy, partial update semantics","structured pino log emitted on real change, no log on no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Manual smoke + rollout notes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One pass through the feature in a running dev environment. No code.

**Steps:** build both sides, curl send-to-user, curl users/search, toggle UI policy, confirm pino log + DB value.

**Verify:** manual smoke checklist.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"manual","acceptanceCriteria":["pnpm -C apps/server build succeeds","pnpm -C apps/client build succeeds","curl POST send-to-user returns 201 + DM appears in UI","UI policy change emits pino log line","DB shows extra.dmOutboundPolicy after whitelist change"]}
```
